title: Barrel 3D
description: Barrel 3D replaces the flat vanilla barrel with a fully modeled 3D version
body:
![barrel 3d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15f9c27917f3c9865d3517d0eabdab2566780592_0.webp)

✨ Barrel 3D replaces the flat vanilla barrel with a fully modeled 3D version, making storage blocks look more detailed and immersive.
🎮 The design stays true to the classic style, ensuring it blends perfectly with the game’s visuals.
⚡ Lightweight and performance-friendly, ideal for any world or build style.
🧩 Fully compatible with Minecraft and works great alongside other resource packs.
